title: crataegus intricata var. rubella
intro: Crataegus intricata var. rubella, also known as a type of hawthorn, is a specific variety of the Crataegus intricata plant, a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of China. The medicinal properties of Crataegus intricata var. rubella are attributed to its flavonoids, oligomeric proanthocyanidins, and other bioactive compounds, which are believed to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. This plant is said to have several health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Crataegus intricata var. rubella can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and extracts, which are often used to support heart health and overall well-being.
